plugin_desc.message: One-click to view, deduplicate, merge and organize your bookmarks.

notice_backup_desc.message: Before executing large-scale folder merging or dead link removal, please export a backup to prevent cloud sync conflicts:

notice_step_1.message: Press shortcut Ctrl + Shift + O (Mac: Cmd + Option + B) to open the browser bookmark manager.

notice_step_2.message: Click the three dots icon (⋮) in the top right corner.

notice_step_3.message: Select "Export bookmarks" from the dropdown and save it as a local .html file.

notice_step_4.message: 💡 Emergency Restore: If you are not satisfied with the results later, select "Import bookmarks" at the same spot to restore everything instantly.

mech_dup_1.message: Automatically merges bookmarks from "folders with the same name" scattered in different paths and safety removes empty directories.

mech_dup_2.message: Automatically removes completely duplicated URL entities within the same folder path.

mech_dead_1.message: Uses multi-threaded concurrency to fast-test bookmark validity (skips browser internal pages automatically).

mech_dead_2.message: Provides a visual modal popup after scanning; physical deletion is only executed after your verification and selection.

status_init.message: Loading browser bookmark data (including local and cloud synced)...

status_cleaning.message: Folder merging complete, performing final local URL deduplication...

status_diagnosing.message: ⚡ Diagnosing dead links in parallel: $CHECKED$ / $TOTAL$... Caught $DEAD$ suspected broken links.

status_dead_none.message: Dead links check complete: No broken links found.

status_dead_found.message: Diagnosis complete! Filtered out $COUNT$ suspected broken URLs, please select them from the popup to remove.

search_placeholder.message: Type name or folder path to search bookmarks...

modal_title.message: Please check to confirm dead links to clear

alert_confirm_dead.message: Start network dead links detection? This action will not delete bookmarks directly, you will pick and confirm them manually after scanning.

alert_dead_none.message: Congratulations! No dead links detected, all URLs are working perfectly!

alert_no_select.message: You have not selected any bookmarks to delete.

alert_confirm_del_final.message: Are you sure you want to completely remove these $COUNT$ checked broken links from your browser bookmarks?

confirm_merge.message:
[Security Confirmation]
System detected $COUNT$ groups of duplicate-named folder entities.
Confirm you have backed up and want to start merging?

alert_merge_success.message: Deep restructuring successful! All same-name folders consolidated, and $COUNT$ duplicate URLs automatically removed.

alert_clean_success.message: Deduplication complete! No folder naming conflicts found, $COUNT$ redundant URLs in the same paths automatically removed.
